ucs.title: [LLM] BlackCat (ALPHV/Noberus) Rust encryptor execution via --access-token argument
ucs.description: Hunts for execution of the ALPHV/BlackCat Rust-based ransomware encryptor, which mandatorily requires the operator-supplied `--access-token` argument paired with BlackCat's distinctive flag set (`--paths`, `--propagated`, `--child`, `--no-prop`, `--no-vm-kill`, `--no-vm-snapshot-kill`, `--no-wall`, `--no-impers`, `--ui`, `--verbose`). This argument grammar is unique to BlackCat — the binary refuses to run without the token — making the combination one of the highest-fidelity ransomware-execution signatures publicly known.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.process_name) as process_name values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.process_hash) as hash values(Processes.process_path) as image from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process="*--access-token*" AND (Processes.process="*--paths*" OR Processes.process="*--propagated*" OR Processes.process="*--child*" OR Processes.process="*--no-prop*" OR Processes.process="*--no-prop-servers*" OR Processes.process="*--no-vm-kill*" OR Processes.process="*--no-vm-snapshot-kill*" OR Processes.process="*--no-wall*" OR Processes.process="*--no-impers*" OR Processes.process="*--ui*" OR Processes.process="*--verbose*") AND NOT (Processes.user IN ("*$","SYSTEM","LOCAL SERVICE","NETWORK SERVICE")) by Processes.dest Processes.user | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime) | sort - lastTime
ucs.kql:
// BlackCat / ALPHV encryptor — --access-token + BlackCat flag set
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where ProcessCommandLine has "--access-token"
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any (
    "--paths", "--propagated", "--child", "--no-prop",
    "--no-prop-servers", "--no-vm-kill", "--no-vm-snapshot-kill",
    "--no-wall", "--no-impers", "--ui", "--verbose"
  )
   or ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"--access-token\s+[a-fA-F0-9]{64}"   // 64-char hex affiliate token
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          FileName, FolderPath, SHA256,
          ProcessCommandLine,
          ParentImage = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ParentCmd   = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          IsRemoteSession = InitiatingProcessParentFileName
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// BlackCat / ALPHV encryptor — --access-token + BlackCat flag set (Sentinel SecurityEvent 4688)
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where AccountType == "User"
| where CommandLine has "--access-token"
| where CommandLine has_any (
    "--paths", "--propagated", "--child", "--no-prop",
    "--no-prop-servers", "--no-vm-kill", "--no-vm-snapshot-kill",
    "--no-wall", "--no-impers", "--ui", "--verbose"
  )
   or CommandLine matches regex @"--access-token\s+[a-fA-F0-9]{64}"
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
          NewProcessName, CommandLine,
          ParentProcessName, TokenElevationType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: BlackCat (ALPHV/Noberus) Ransomware Encryptor Execution via --access-token
id: 7c1f2a91-ab3c-4d12-9a55-blackcat0001
status: experimental
description: |
  Detects execution of the ALPHV/BlackCat Rust-based ransomware encryptor, which
  requires the operator-supplied --access-token argument and is invoked with a
  distinctive set of operator flags (--propagated, --child, --no-prop,
  --no-vm-kill, --no-vm-snapshot-kill, --no-wall, --no-impers, --ui).
references:
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa23-353a
  - https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2022/06/13/the-many-lives-of-blackcat-ransomware/
  - https://blogs.vmware.com/security/2022/06/blackcat-in-a-flash.html
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/08
tags:
  - attack.impact
  - attack.t1486
  - attack.t1059
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_token:
    CommandLine|contains: '--access-token'
  selection_flag:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - '--paths'
      - '--propagated'
      - '--child'
      - '--no-prop'
      - '--no-prop-servers'
      - '--no-vm-kill'
      - '--no-vm-snapshot-kill'
      - '--no-wall'
      - '--no-impers'
      - '--ui'
      - '--verbose'
  filter_machine_account:
    User|endswith: '$'
  condition: selection_token and selection_flag and not filter_machine_account
falsepositives:
  - Highly unlikely. The combination of --access-token plus any BlackCat operator flag is unique to ALPHV/BlackCat tooling.
level: critical
ucs.rationale: ALPHV/BlackCat (Noberus) is a Russian-speaking RaaS first observed Nov-2021, descended from the DarkSide/BlackMatter codebase but rewritten in Rust. The encryptor is operator-gated: it will not execute without an `--access-token <64-hex>` argument supplied by the affiliate, and BlackCat documentation/Mandiant/Microsoft/CISA reverse-engineering reports (UNC4466, Storm-tracked affiliates) all confir
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID

ucs.title: [LLM] BlackCat pre-encryption recovery-inhibition chain (vssadmin + wmic shadowcopy + bcdedit + wbadmin within 5 min)
ucs.description: Detects BlackCat's signature pre-encryption sweep where the encryptor (or affiliate batch script) launches at least three of the four recovery-inhibition utilities — vssadmin, wmic shadowcopy, bcdedit, wbadmin — from a single host within a 5-minute window using the exact argument strings published in CISA AA23-353A and Microsoft's BlackCat reporting. The compressed multi-tool sequence is the fingerprint, not any single command in isolation.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count dc(Processes.process_name) as distinctTools values(Processes.process_name) as tools values(Processes.process) as cmds values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parents values(Processes.parent_process) as parent_cmd min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where ((Processes.process_name="vssadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*delete*" AND Processes.process="*shadow*") OR (Processes.process_name="wmic.exe" AND Processes.process="*shadowcopy*" AND Processes.process="*delete*") OR (Processes.process_name="bcdedit.exe" AND (Processes.process="*recoveryenabled*No*" OR Processes.process="*ignoreallfailures*")) OR (Processes.process_name="wbadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*delete*" AND (Processes.process="*catalog*" OR Processes.process="*backup*"))) AND NOT (Processes.user IN ("*$","SYSTEM")) by Processes.dest Processes.user _time span=5m | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | where distinctTools >= 3 | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime) | sort - lastTime
ucs.kql:
// BlackCat pre-encryption inhibit-recovery chain — 3+ distinct tools on same host within 5min
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete" and ProcessCommandLine has "shadow")
     or (FileName =~ "wmic.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy", "delete"))
     or (FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe" and (ProcessCommandLine has_all ("recoveryenabled","No") or ProcessCommandLine has "ignoreallfailures"))
     or (FileName =~ "wbadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("catalog","backup"))
| summarize
    DistinctTools  = dcount(FileName),
    Tools          = make_set(FileName),
    SampleCmds     = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 8),
    Parents        = make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName, 5),
    ParentCmds     = make_set(InitiatingProcessCommandLine, 5),
    SHA256Set      = make_set(InitiatingProcessSHA256, 5),
    FirstSeen      = min(Timestamp),
    LastSeen       = max(Timestamp)
    by DeviceName, AccountName, bin(Timestamp, 5m)
| where DistinctTools >= 3   // BlackCat consistently runs vssadmin + wmic + bcdedit (+/- wbadmin) back-to-back
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// BlackCat pre-encryption inhibit-recovery chain — Sentinel SecurityEvent 4688
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where AccountType == "User"
| extend FileLower = tolower(NewProcessName)
| where (FileLower endswith "\\vssadmin.exe" and CommandLine has "delete" and CommandLine has "shadow")
     or (FileLower endswith "\\wmic.exe"     and CommandLine has "shadowcopy" and CommandLine has "delete")
     or (FileLower endswith "\\bcdedit.exe"  and (CommandLine has "ignoreallfailures" or (CommandLine has "recoveryenabled" and CommandLine has "No")))
     or (FileLower endswith "\\wbadmin.exe"  and CommandLine has "delete" and (CommandLine has "catalog" or CommandLine has "backup"))
| summarize
    DistinctTools = dcount(FileLower),
    Tools         = make_set(FileLower),
    SampleCmds    = make_set(CommandLine, 8),
    Parents       = make_set(ParentProcessName, 5),
    FirstSeen     = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen      = max(TimeGenerated)
    by Computer, Account, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| where DistinctTools >= 3
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.rationale: While T1490 inhibit-system-recovery commands are used by many ransomware families, BlackCat/ALPHV's published affiliate playbook (CISA AA23-353A, Microsoft Threat Intelligence, Sophos X-Ops, Symantec Threat Hunter) consistently shows the encryptor calling a CMD one-liner that chains `vssadmin.exe Delete Shadows /all /quiet & wmic.exe Shadowcopy Delete & bcdedit /set {default} bootstatuspolicy igno
